failures.text: → Zero server costs. Pricing changes are a single text edit. Visitors compare tiers on one screen and reach out pre-qual
→ Sub-1.5s Lighthouse, zero ongoing server costs. Rebuild triggers on git push. The owner has full autonomy over content
→ Zero security patches needed in 12 months of operation. Content changes are a pull request away.
